source: 4th shunting engine in Liberec speaking, we are going from dolní nádraží and need to go back to the station to track 18, we are approximately 190 meters long.
target: 利贝雷茨 4 号调机呼叫，我们正从货运站出发，需要返回车站 18 道，我们全长约 190 米。

source: 4th shunting engine in Liberec, you will go from 18th track to ÚTD section onto 401st track and then follow commands of 1st signal box.
target: 利贝雷茨 4 号调机，你将从 18 道经由中央技术维修站区段进入 401 道，然后听从 1 号信号楼的指令。

source: 4th shunting engine is allowed to shunt from junction 401 to dolní nádraží.
target: 允许 4 号调机从 401 号道岔区向货运站进行调车。

source: 4th shunting engine roger. From dolní nádraží stop after junction 401 and then via 401st track to 18th track.
target: 4 号调机收到。从货运站出发，在 401 号道岔后停车，然后经由 401 道前往 18 道。

source: 57589 at track 16 in Liberec. We have completed brake check and are ready to depart to Turnov. Thanks for Your cooperation.
target: 57589 次在利贝雷茨 16 道。我们已完成制动试验，准备出发前往图尔诺夫。感谢合作。

source: 843's engines cool the best if running unloaded and at slightly elevated RPM. If you find a reasonably long stretch of line without incline (such as at Sychrov and Hodkovice stations), you can switch the cruise control off, put the reverser to Diesel, and rev the engine to something like 1200-ish RPM. At the end of the level section, return RPM to idle, reverser to Forward, wait for RPM to drop, and continue your cruising.
target: 843 型内燃动车组在空载且转速略微提升时冷却效果最好。如果你发现一段足够长且没有坡度的线路，例如在锡赫罗夫和莫黑尔卡河畔霍德科维采车站，你可以关闭定速巡航，将方向手柄置于内燃机位，并将转速提升至 1200 转左右。在平直道末端，将转速降至怠速，方向手柄置于向前位，等待转速下降后继续巡航。
小试调车 - 第 1 部分
小试调车 - 第 2 部分

source: A class 843 has broken down in Turnov. Can You fix it and drive it to Liberec for maintenance?
target: 一列 843 型在图尔诺夫故障了。你能修复它并把它开回利贝雷茨进行维修吗？

source: A moment, I will find the orders.
target: 请稍等，我找一下调度命令。

source: All right. You'll shunt from 10a towards Chrastava and stop just beyond the Se32 signal. Then you'll shunt to the 114th track where you'll finish shunting. Wait for the signaller of the fifth signalbox to allow the shunting.
target: 好的。你将从 10a 向赫拉斯塔瓦方向调车，并停在 Se32 信号机外侧。然后调往 114 道并完成调车。等待 5 号信号楼信号员授权调车。
并且还经过第 7 和第 8 部分。

source: And it is here! 95 degrees Celsius. At this temperature, the engine is no longer able to provide full power. With growing temperature, the power will be increasingly limited. Use every possible mean to cool the engine. The timetable is no longer a priority. The priority is to get to Jeřmanice - the summit of the line.
target: 来了！95 摄氏度。在此温度下，发动机不再能提供全功率。随着温度升高，功率限制将进一步增加。尽一切可能冷却发动机。时刻表不再是首要任务。首要任务是到达线路最高点——耶日马尼采。

source: And second one is in km 115.383.
Another way to tell the banking engine to stop applying power is to use one short signal. For simulation purposes short signal is any audible signal shorter than 0.5 second.
target: 另一种通知补机停止施加动力的方法是使用一声短鸣笛。在模拟中，短鸣笛是指任何短于 0.5 秒的声响信号。

source: Another way to tell the banking engine to stop applying power is to use one short signal. For simulation purposes short signal is any audible signal shorter than 0.5 second.

将直通制动器施加至最大

source: Apply some power to get moving
Apply some power to get moving
Apply some power to get moving

As you can see, the valve is now closed. That is because you should start this locomotive with both the radio and safety system turned off, as the voltage spikes could damage them. You will learn how to activate those in a minute.
target: 如你所见，阀门现在是关闭的。这是因为你应该在无线电和安全系统关闭的情况下启动这台机车，因为电压波动可能会损坏它们。你很快就会学习如何激活它们。

source: As you can see, the valve is now closed. That is because you should start this locomotive with both the radio and safety system turned off, as the voltage spikes could damage them. You will learn how to activate those in a minute.
target: 如你所见，阀门现在是关闭的。这是因为你应该在无线电和安全系统关闭的情况下启动这台机车，因为电压波动可能会损坏它们。你很快就会学习如何激活它们。

source: As you hold down the green start button, the pump will begin to push oil into the engine. This process can take up to a minute if the locomotive is cold. You need to hold the button all the way until engine reaches idle revs of 480 RPM.
target: 当你按住绿色启动按钮时，泵将开始向发动机泵油。如果机车是冷的，这个过程可能需要一分钟。你需要一直按住按钮，直到发动机达到 480 转的怠速。

source: As you hold down the green start button, the pump will begin to push oil into the engine. This process can take up to a minute if the locomotive is cold. You need to hold the button all the way until engine reaches idle revs of 480 RPM.
target: 当你按住绿色启动按钮时，泵将开始向发动机泵油。如果机车是冷的，这个过程可能需要一分钟。你需要一直按住按钮，直到发动机达到 480 转的怠速。

source: Battle the summer heatwave with overheating 843.
target: 驾驶过热的 843 型在夏日热浪中奋战。

source: Begin our walkaround by checking the exterior of the locomotive. Check that the buffers aren't pushed inside. Continue by looking under the locomotive and checking that nothing is hanging from the bogies. Also check that the drainage valves are closed and the fuel caps aren't missing.
target: 通过检查机车外部开始巡视。检查缓冲器没有被顶死。继续观察机车下方，检查转向架上没有挂着任何东西。还要检查排水阀是否关闭，燃油盖是否完好。

source: Begin our walkaround by checking the exterior of the locomotive. Check that the buffers aren't pushed inside. Continue by looking under the locomotive and checking that nothing is hanging from the bogies. Also check that the drainage valves are closed and the fuel caps aren't missing.
target: 通过检查机车外部开始巡视。检查缓冲器没有被顶死。继续观察机车下方，检查转向架上没有挂着任何东西。还要检查排水阀是否关闭，燃油盖是否完好。
斯塔拉帕卡附近的别拉

source: Below you can see two red valves, those valves close air pipes to the front and back bogie respectively. If you close them then the bogies won't apply any braking force. Now proceed into the front cabin and open both doors to the electric cabinet.
target: 在下方你可以看到两个红色阀门，这些阀门分别关闭通往前后转向架的风管。如果你关闭它们，转向架将不会产生任何制动力。现在进入前司机室，打开电气柜的双扇门。

source: Below you can see two red valves, those valves close air pipes to the front and back bogie respectively. If you close them then the bogies won't apply any braking force. Now proceed into the front cabin and open both doors to the electric cabinet.

source: Breakers here control practically everything on this vehicle ranging from simple things like wipers to more important things like the central computer or regulator.
target: 这里的断路器几乎控制着这辆车上的一切，从雨刷这种简单的东西到中央电脑或牵引手柄等更重要的东西。

source: But your vacation is over and you are here - in the sweaty cab of the 843 class DMU. And the cab air cooler gave up! It is not even half past ten in the morning, and it is 38 degrees in shade already. Your engines are running hot, and so are you. Don't forget that the primary goal is to arrive safely!
target: 但你的假期结束了，你现在身处 843 型内燃动车组闷热的司机室里。而且司机室空调坏了！现在甚至还没到早上十点半，遮阳处就已经 38 度了。你的发动机很烫，你也是。别忘了首要目标是安全抵达！

source: Good Evening driver, here dispatcher, go ahead.
target: 晚上好司机，这里是调度员，请讲。

source: Good Evening, here is a driver of an engine on the 10b track.
target: 晚上好，这里是 10b 轨道的机车司机。

source: Good day, today You will be doing some shunting before driving to Turnov. Your train will have two banking locomotives coupled until reaching Jeřmanice station, You will need to decouple those there. Good luck!
target: 你好，今天你在前往图尔诺夫前要进行一些调车作业。你的列车将连挂两台补机直至到达耶日马尼采站，你需要在那里将它们解挂。祝你好运！

source: Good day, today You will be doing some shunting before driving to Turnov. Your train will have two banking locomotives coupled until reaching Jeřmanice station, You will need to decouple those there. Good luck!
target: 你好，今天你在前往图尔诺夫前要进行一些调车作业。你的列车将连挂两台补机直至到达耶日马尼采站，你需要在那里将它们解挂。祝你好运！

source: Good evening, this is driver of train 1260 in Liberec at track 107. I would like to drive to the depot now.
target: 晚上好，这里是利贝雷茨 107 号轨道的 1260 次列车司机。我现在想前往机务段。

source: Good evening, today's shift will be difficult. A colleague left the train here saying that it is broken. He spent more than two hours trying to fix it, but wasn't successful. It is Your job to find out what is wrong and get the train to maintenance depot to get it fixed. Good luck!
target: 晚上好，今天的班次会很困难。一位同事把列车留在这里并说它坏了。他花了两个多小时试图修理但没成功。你的任务是找出故障并将列车送往维修车间修理。祝你好运！

source: Good evening, tonight should be pretty quick drive. You are going to get this train to Liberec and put it in the depot for the night. Good luck!
target: 晚上好，今晚的驾驶应该很快。你要将这列车开往利贝雷茨并停放在机务段过夜。祝你好运！

source: Good job! You have learned some new things today!
target: 干得好！你今天学到了一些新东西！

source: Good job! You have learned some new things today!
target: 干得好！你今天学到了一些新东西！

source: Good morning, driver of 4th shunting engine in Liberec on 3rd track in depot here. I'd like to request a shunting path to 18th track from the south.
target: 早上好，这里是利贝雷茨机务段 3 号轨道的第 4 号调机司机。我想请求一条从南侧前往 18 号轨道的调车路径。

source: Good morning, today You will be taking NEx from Česká Třebová to Hamburg. There was a hill slide last night at Bad Schandau so many trains are being rerouted through wherever possible. You have two banking engines at the end of the train, but won't probably need them until reaching Turnov station.
target: 早上好，今天你将驾驶 NEx 从捷克特热博瓦前往汉堡。由于昨晚巴特尚道发生山体滑坡，许多列车正尽可能改道运行。你在车尾有两台补机，但在到达图尔诺夫站之前可能不需要它们。

source: Good morning, today you will be doing some shunting actions here in Liberec. You will pick up some wagons in the yard and get them downhill to factories. Remember that you will have to check if junctions there are properly set.
target: 早上好，今天你将在利贝雷茨进行一些调车作业。你将从站场取一些货车并送往山下的工厂。记得检查那里的道岔是否设置正确。

source: Great job, you have learned some of the basics. You can continue to more training courses or start driving the 843 hauled services now!
target: 干得好，你已经掌握了一些基础知识。你可以继续参加更多培训课程，或者现在开始驾驶 843 型动车组。

source: Great job, you have learned some of the basics. You can continue to more training courses or start driving the 843 hauled services now!
target: 干得好，你已经掌握了一些基础知识。你可以继续参加更多培训课程，或者现在开始驾驶 843 型动车组。

source: Great work, you have learned the basics of banking operations. You can master those in the "Mudslide" and "A bit of shunting" scenarios.
target: 干得出色，你已经掌握了补机作业的基础知识。你可以在“山体滑坡”和“小试调车”情景中精通这些操作。

source: Great work, you have learned the basics of banking operations. You can master those in the "Mudslide" and "A bit of shunting" scenarios.
target: 干得出色，你已经掌握了补机作业的基础知识。你可以在“山体滑坡”和“小试调车”情景中精通这些操作。

source: Great, now that we have checked and everything is alright you can board the locomotive. Then proceed into the engine room.
target: 太好了，既然我们已经检查完毕且一切正常，你可以登上机车了。然后进入机械间。

source: Great, now that we have checked and everything is alright you can board the locomotive. Then proceed into the engine room.
target: 太好了，既然我们已经检查完毕且一切正常，你可以登上机车了。然后进入机械间。

source: Great, now that we have checked and everything is alright you can board the train.
target: 太好了，既然我们已经检查完毕且一切正常，你可以上车了。

source: Great, now that we have checked and everything is alright you can board the train.
target: 太好了，既然我们已经检查完毕且一切正常，你可以上车了。

source: Hello 1272, here Jermanice dispatcher. I haven't expected you here so quickly. You'll need to wait for a meet with the opposing express. But he is not even on the block post. So, 5 minutes?
target: 1272 次你好，这里是耶日马尼采调度员。没想到你这么快就到了。你需要等待与对向快车交会，但他还没进入闭塞区间。你得等上大概 5 分钟？

source: Hello 1272, here Sychrov dispatcher. There is a traffic running in front of you. and it is getting overheated so it runs slow. You'll pass him at Hodkovice. Probably. Perhaps. I hope.
target: 1272 次你好，这里是锡赫罗夫调度员。你前方有车在运行，由于过热导致运行缓慢。你应该会在莫黑尔卡河畔霍德科维采超过他。大概吧。也许。我希望如此。

source: Hello 1275, dispatcher here. You'll meet a freight in Košťálov, and it is approaching already. I know I just stopped you, but.could you clear the junction area as soon as possible so he can pass without stopping?
target: 1275 次你好，我是调度员。你将在科什佳洛夫与一列货车交会，它已经接近了。我知道我刚让你停下，但……你能尽快驶离道岔区域吗，以便让他不停车通过？

source: Hello Driver, welcome to the Training Center. Today we will explore the Class 750 Locomotive and you will get to know some new and interesting things about it. Start by approaching the locomotive. Begin our walkaround by checking the exterior of the locomotive. Check that the buffers aren't pushed inside. Continue by looking under the locomotive and checking that nothing is hanging from the bogies. Also check that the drainage valves are closed and the fuel caps aren't missing.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天我们将探索 Class 750 机车，你会了解到一些关于它的新奇有趣的知识。首先请靠近机车。从检查机车外部开始我们的绕车检查。检查缓冲器是否没有缩进。继续检查机车下方，确认转向架上没有挂着东西。同时检查排水阀是否关闭，燃油盖是否完好。

source: Hello Driver, welcome to the Training Center. Today we will explore the Class 750 Locomotive and you will get to know some new and interesting things about it. Start by approaching the locomotive. Begin our walkaround by checking the exterior of the locomotive. Check that the buffers aren't pushed inside. Continue by looking under the locomotive and checking that nothing is hanging from the bogies. Also check that the drainage valves are closed and the fuel caps aren't missing.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天我们将探索 Class 750 机车，你会了解到一些关于它的新奇有趣的知识。首先请靠近机车。从检查机车外部开始我们的绕车检查。检查缓冲器是否没有缩进。继续检查机车下方，确认转向架上没有挂着东西。同时检查排水阀是否关闭，燃油盖是否完好。

source: Hello Driver, welcome to the Training Center. Today we will explore the Class 843 and you will get to know some new and interesting things about it. Start by approaching the train.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天我们将探索 Class 843，你会了解到一些关于它的新奇有趣的知识。首先请靠近列车。

source: Hello Driver, welcome to the Training Center. Today we will explore the Class 843 and you will get to know some new and interesting things about it. Start by approaching the train.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天我们将探索 Class 843，你会了解到一些关于它的新奇有趣的知识。首先请靠近列车。

source: Hello driver and welcome to the Training Center. Today you are going to learn some basics of operating the Czech Class 750 locomotive.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天你将学习操作捷克 Class 750 机车的基础知识。

source: Hello driver and welcome to the Training Center. Today you are going to learn some basics of operating the Czech Class 750 locomotive.
target: 你好司机，欢迎来到训练中心。今天你将学习操作捷克 Class 750 机车的基础知识。

source: Hello driver, dispatcher from Malá Skála here. I have two failed level crossings, so please fill out train order for train 1266.
target: 你好司机，我是马拉斯卡拉的调度员。我有两个道岔失灵了，所以请为 1266 次列车填写行车命令。

source: Hello driver, today is the last day of regular service of Class 843 trains on this route. Enjoy the calm ride!
target: 你好司机，今天是 Class 843 动车组在本线路运行的最后一天。享受平静的旅程吧！

source: Hello, dispatcher of Liberec station here. You will drive from track 10b to the track in direction of Chrastava. Stop just after signal Se32. Then through track 116 to track 10, signalist will contact You there with further instructions.
target: 你好，这里是利贝雷茨站调度员。你将从 10b 轨道开往赫拉斯塔瓦方向的轨道。在 Se32 信号机后停车。然后通过 116 号轨道前往 10 号轨道，那里的号志员会联系你并给出进一步指示。

source: Hello, driver! We have a problem here! The train 1264 got stuck in Malá Skála. The driver tried to repair it so it gets to here at least without passengers. But it wasn't sucessful at all. So... You will take the goggles at track 10b and go rescue it.
target: 你好，司机！我们遇到麻烦了！1264 次列车在马拉斯卡拉抛锚了。司机尝试修理它，以便至少能在不载客的情况下开到这里，但没成功。所以……你将驾驶 10b 轨道的“眼镜”机车去救援。

source: Hello, first at track 210, You are going to leave one coach there. Then to 117th and into the hall at track 202, leave the second coach there.
target: 你好，首先在 210 号轨道留下一节车厢。然后前往 117 号并进入 202 号轨道的库房，在那里留下第二节车厢。

source: Hello, this is dispatcher of Liberec station. I understand, Your path from track 107 to depot will be ready in a moment. The shuntmaster will tell you there what to do.
target: 你好，这里是利贝雷茨站调度员。明白，你从 107 号轨道前往机务段的路径稍后就好。调车长会在那里告诉你该怎么做。

source: Help supply some factories in Liberec with new goods and take out the empty wagons.
target: 协助向利贝雷茨的一些工厂供应新货物，并运走空货车。

source: Here is the brain of this vehicle, the central computer and traction regulator. As the Class 843 trains were created between years 1995 and 1997, some of the components still use analog control circuits. Here also lies the GM15 signal converter, which converts all signals between their analog and digital representation. Below you can find some important breakers, which control diesel engines and traction engines.
target: 这里是本车的“大脑”——中央计算机和牵引手柄。由于 Class 843 动车组是在 1995 年至 1997 年间制造的，部分组件仍使用模拟控制电路。这里还有 GM15 信号转换器，负责模拟信号和数字信号之间的转换。下方可以找到一些重要的断路器，用于控制柴油机和牵引电机。

source: Here is the brain of this vehicle, the central computer and traction regulator. As the Class 843 trains were created between years 1995 and 1997, some of the components still use analog control circuits. Here also lies the GM15 signal converter, which converts all signals between their analog and digital representation. Below you can find some important breakers, which control diesel engines and traction engines.
target: 这里是本车的“大脑”——中央计算机和牵引手柄。由于 Class 843 动车组是在 1995 年至 1997 年间制造的，部分组件仍使用模拟控制电路。这里还有 GM15 信号转换器，负责模拟信号和数字信号之间的转换。下方可以找到一些重要的断路器，用于控制柴油机和牵引电机。

source: Here signalbox five, the engine for light engine run 101263 at Liberec, you are cleared to shunt from 10b track to just beyond Se32 signal. You'll have a signal aspect for a move back.
target: 这里是五号信号楼，呼叫在利贝雷茨执行 101263 次单机运行的机车，准许你从 10b 轨道调车至 Se32 信号机外。你会得到折返的信号显示。

source: Here we are looking at the RTO, you can operate train heating and lights from here. It is also possible to turn on the engine preheating here.
target: 这里是 RTO，你可以从这里操作列车供暖和灯光。也可以在这里开启发动机预热。

source: Here we are looking at the RTO, you can operate train heating and lights from here. It is also possible to turn on the engine preheating here.
target: 这里是 RTO，你可以从这里操作列车供暖和灯光。也可以在这里开启发动机预热。

source: Here we see three switches, the left most one is disconnected, the middle one controls the operating mode. If you need to control another locomotive in double traction put it in the Double position. The last switch turns power regulation on or off. The locomotive won't apply any power if that switch is in the Off position.
target: 这里有三个开关：最左边的已断开；中间的控制运行模式，如果需要双机重联控制另一台机车，请将其置于“双机重联”位置；最后一个开关开启或关闭动力调节。如果该开关处于“关闭”位置，机车将不会输出动力。

source: Here you can see cooling towers, those on the left are responsible for the cooling of the oil circuit, those on the right then cool down the engine cooling water.
target: 这里你可以看到冷却塔，左侧的负责油路循环冷却，右侧的负责发动机冷却水降温。

source: Here you can see cooling towers, those on the left are responsible for the cooling of the oil circuit, those on the right then cool down the engine cooling water.
target: 这里你可以看到冷却塔，左侧的负责油路循环冷却，右侧的负责发动机冷却水降温。

source: Here you can see the LTR brake distributor. Most of the older Czech locomotives are equipped with this. You can select the brake mode here, disable air braking on the locomotive and also empty the control reservoir.
target: 这里你可以看到 LTR 制动分配器。大多数较旧的捷克机车都配备了这种设备。你可以在这里选择制动模式，禁用机车的空气制动，还可以排空控制风缸。

source: Here you can see the LTR brake distributor. Most of the older Czech locomotives are equipped with this. You can select the brake mode here, disable air braking on the locomotive and also empty the control reservoir.
target: 这里你可以看到 LTR 制动分配器。大多数较旧的捷克机车都配备了这种设备。你可以在这里选择制动模式，禁用机车的空气制动，还可以排空控制风缸。

source: Here you see battery voltage and amper meters. The battery should typically have around 110 Volts, if the voltage is too low the engine then may not start.
target: 这里你可以看到蓄电池电压表和电流表。电池电压通常应在 110 伏左右，如果电压太低，发动机可能无法启动。

source: Here you see battery voltage and amper meters. The battery should typically have around 110 Volts, if the voltage is too low the engine then may not start.
target: 这里你可以看到蓄电池电压表和电流表。电池电压通常应在 110 伏左右，如果电压太低，发动机可能无法启动。

source: Here you see the red air valves coming into and from the BSE indirect brake controller. Close all of them if you need to tow this train.
target: 这里你可以看到接入和引出 BSE 间接制动控制器的红色空气阀。如果需要回送本车，请关闭所有阀门。

source: Here you see the red air valves coming into and from the BSE indirect brake controller. Close all of them if you need to tow this train.
target: 这里你可以看到接入和引出 BSE 间接制动控制器的红色空气阀。如果需要回送本车，请关闭所有阀门。

source: Here you see the voltage and amper meters, check the leftmost amper meter after starting if the batteries are charging. The most important switch below is the second one from the left, as this switch can turn off the electrodynamic brake. Use this when you have issues with the electrodynamic brake.
target: 这里你可以看到电压表和电流表，启动后请检查最左边的电流表以确认电池是否正在充电。下方最重要的开关是左起第二个，因为该开关可以关闭电阻制动。当电阻制动出现问题时请使用此开关。

source: Here you see the voltage and amper meters, check the leftmost amper meter after starting if the batteries are charging. The most important switch below is the second one from the left, as this switch can turn off the electrodynamic brake. Use this when you have issues with the electrodynamic brake.
target: 这里你可以看到电压表和电流表，启动后请检查最左边的电流表以确认电池是否正在充电。下方最重要的开关是左起第二个，因为该开关可以关闭电阻制动。当电阻制动出现问题时请使用此开关。

source: Hi, dispatcher here. You will be crossing with another train at Košťálov so You can slow down a bit.
target: 你好，我是调度员。你将在科什佳洛夫与另一列车交会，所以你可以稍微减速。

source: Hi, driver of diesel locomotive at track 10b at northern junction area in Liberec. I'd like to request a shunting route from track 10b to the hump.
target: 你好，这里是位于利贝雷茨北咽喉区 10b 道的内燃机车司机。申请办理从 10b 道至驼峰的调车进路。

source: Hi, driver! I have a written order for you. At Malá Skála, you'll enter an occupied track. But you probably know. The departure route is set, so: The train 101263 from track No1 to Malá Skála, departure!
target: 你好，司机！我有份书面命令给你。在马拉斯卡拉，你将进入一条占用轨道。但你应该已经知道了。出发路径已排好，所以：101263 次列车从 1 号轨道开往马拉斯卡拉，发车！

source: Hi. The express you are supposed to meet here is delayed. He has some problems with overheating. The meeting will happen at Malá Skála station.
target: 你好。你原定在此交会的快车晚点了。他遇到了过热故障。交会将在马拉斯卡拉站进行。

source: Hold the Throttle and Brake lever in the S position. In this position you can increase the set power to get the train moving. You can see the set power on the display going between -100 %, 0 % and 100 %. The power will increase as long as you hold the lever in this position, after returning the lever to the J position the set power will be maintained. You can also decrease the set power in the V position. Decrease the set power to under 30 % as the speed reaches 55 km/h and then apply the power again.
target: 将油门制动杆保持在 S 位。在此位置，你可以增加设定功率使列车移动。你可以看到屏幕上的设定功率在 -100 %、0 % 和 100 % 之间变化。只要你将杆保持在该位置，功率就会增加，在将杆返回 J 位后，设定功率将保持不变。你也可以在 V 位降低设定功率。当速度达到 55 公里/小时时，将设定功率降低至 30 % 以下，然后再次施加动力。

source: Hold the Throttle and Brake lever in the S position. In this position you can increase the set power to get the train moving. You can see the set power on the display going between -100 %, 0 % and 100 %. The power will increase as long as you hold the lever in this position, after returning the lever to the J position the set power will be maintained. You can also decrease the set power in the V position. Decrease the set power to under 30 % as the speed reaches 55 km/h and then apply the power again.
target: 将油门制动杆保持在 S 位。在此位置，你可以增加设定功率使列车移动。你可以看到屏幕上的设定功率在 -100 %、0 % 和 100 % 之间变化。只要你将杆保持在该位置，功率就会增加，在将杆返回 J 位后，设定功率将保持不变。你也可以在 V 位降低设定功率。当速度达到 55 公里/小时时，将设定功率降低至 30 % 以下，然后再次施加动力。

target: 明白了，前往驼峰，然后 20 道已被占用。

source: I understand, leave one coach on 210, then 117 and leave the second one at 202 in the hall.
target: 明白了，在 210 道留下一节客车，然后前往 117 道，最后将第二节留在库内 202 道。

source: I understand, stop after junction 209, refuel at 201st and leave it at 201c. Good night!
target: 明白了，在 209 号道岔后停车，在 201a 处加油并将其停放在 201c。晚安！

source: I understand, stop after signal Se32 and then to track 10 through track 116. Thanks.
target: 明白了，在 Se32 信号机后停车，然后经由 116 道前往 10 道。谢谢。

source: I'm ready for shunting with goggles on the 10b track for the train 101263.
target: 我已准备好驾驶“护目镜”在 10b 道为 101263 次列车进行调车。

source: If you want to shut it down, move the mode switch to the Banking position, as in the Off position the air valve won't be powered and you will lose all brake pipe pressure.
target: 如果你想将其关闭，请将模式开关移至补机位置，因为在关闭位置气阀将失去供电，你会损失所有列车管压力。

source: If you want to shut it down, move the mode switch to the Banking position, as in the Off position the air valve won't be powered and you will lose all brake pipe pressure.
target: 如果你想将其关闭，请将模式开关移至补机位置，因为在关闭位置气阀将失去供电，你会损失所有列车管压力。

source: In a similar way you can also control the Electrodynamic brake. Decrease the power back to 0 % and then hold the Throttle and Brake lever in BE position to increase the braking power. Set braking power can be then decreased in the J position.
target: 以类似的方式，你也可以控制电阻制动。将功率降回 0 %，然后将油门制动杆保持在 BE 位以增加制动力。设定的制动力可以在 J 位降低。

source: In a similar way you can also control the Electrodynamic brake. Decrease the power back to 0 % and then hold the Throttle and Brake lever in BE position to increase the braking power. Set braking power can be then decreased in the J position.
target: 以类似的方式，你也可以控制电阻制动。将功率降回 0 %，然后将油门制动杆保持在 BE 位以增加制动力。设定的制动力可以在 J 位降低。

source: Insert Oil Stick Back To Compressor
Insert Oil Stick Back To Engine
Insert the reverser and move it forwards to the Engine Only position. The engine can only be started in one of the two Engine Only positions.
target: 插入换向手柄并将其向前移至“仅发动机”位置。发动机只能在两个“仅发动机”位置之一启动。

source: Insert the reverser and move it forwards to the Engine Only position. The engine can only be started in one of the two Engine Only positions.
target: 插入换向手柄并将其向前移至“仅发动机”位置。发动机只能在两个“仅发动机”位置之一启动。

source: Insert the reverser and put it in the first position forwards. You can only start the engine only in the "DIESEL" (Engine Only) positions, which are both first forward and back from neutral.
target: 插入换向手柄并将其置于向前第一位。你只能在“DIESEL”（仅发动机）位置启动发动机，该位置位于中性位向前和向后的第一档。

source: Insert the reverser and put it in the first position forwards. You can only start the engine only in the "DIESEL" (Engine Only) positions, which are both first forward and back from neutral.
target: 插入换向手柄并将其置于向前第一位。你只能在“DIESEL”（仅发动机）位置启动发动机，该位置位于中性位向前和向后的第一档。

source: It is that part of the year when you would like to stand on a surfboard, drink cold beverages, enjoy the view of a calm lake with surfers creating long wakes, and a sun reflecting in waves.
target: 这是一年中的那个时候，你会想站在冲浪板上，喝着冷饮，欣赏宁静湖泊的景色，冲浪者划出长长的波痕，阳光在波浪中反射。

source: It seems that there are locks missing in the yellow holder. Let's go and fix that! Look at both sides before crossing the rails!
target: 黄色支架上的锁似乎丢失了。我们去修好它！过轨道前观察两侧！

source: Morning, dispatcher here. You will drive from 3rd track to 109th and then through 1st track behind signal Se11. Then onto occupied 18th track.
target: 早上好，调度在此。你将从 3 道驾驶至 109 道，然后经过 1 道前往信号机 Se11 后方。随后进入已占用的 18 道。

source: Mudslide in Bad Schandau caused many diversions of crossborder traffic.
target: 巴德尚道发生的泥石流导致许多跨境交通线路被迫绕行。

source: Now check that we have enough oil in the compressor.
target: 现在检查压缩机内是否有足够的机油。

source: Now check that we have enough oil in the compressor.
target: 现在检查压缩机内是否有足够的机油。

source: Now decrease the power back to 0 % and hold the Throttle and Brake lever in the BP position. This position applies the pneumatic brakes. Those can also be released in the J position.
target: 现在将牵引力降回 0 %，并将牵引制动杆保持在 BP 位置。此位置将施加空气制动。也可以在 J 位置缓解。

source: Now decrease the power back to 0 % and hold the Throttle and Brake lever in the BP position. This position applies the pneumatic brakes. Those can also be released in the J position.
target: 现在将牵引力降回 0 %，并将牵引制动杆保持在 BP 位置。此位置将施加空气制动。也可以在 J 位置缓解。

source: Now hold the green start button until the engine starts. It is necessary to hold the button, otherwise the engine won't start.
target: 现在按住绿色启动按钮直到发动机启动。必须按住按钮，否则发动机将无法启动。

source: Now hold the green start button until the engine starts. It is necessary to hold the button, otherwise the engine won't start.
target: 现在按住绿色启动按钮直到发动机启动。必须按住按钮，否则发动机将无法启动。

source: Now it is time to drive some faster trains.
target: 现在是时候驾驶一些更快的列车了。

source: Now look at the relays. The first important set are relays RCB, RD and RE, those three relays control which power notch the locomotive will use. Older Czech locomotives used binary or Grey codes to control the power.
target: 现在观察继电器。第一组重要的继电器是 RCB、RD 和 RE，这三个继电器控制机车使用的功率级位。较旧的捷克机车使用二进制或格雷码来控制功率。

source: Now look at the relays. The first important set are relays RCB, RD and RE, those three relays control which power notch the locomotive will use. Older Czech locomotives used binary or Grey codes to control the power.
target: 现在观察继电器。第一组重要的继电器是 RCB、RD 和 RE，这三个继电器控制机车使用的功率级位。较旧的捷克机车使用二进制或格雷码来控制功率。

source: Now set the Reverser to position P (Forward).
target: 现在将换向手柄置于 P 位置（向前）。

source: Now set the Reverser to position P (Forward).
target: 现在将换向手柄置于 P 位置（向前）。

source: Now tell the engines to apply full power one long and two short signals. You can use both horns and the whistle. Do not apply any power yourself yet, so you can see their effect.
target: 现在发出一长两短的信号告知其他机车施加全功率。你可以使用汽笛或风笛。你自己先不要施加任何牵引力，以便观察它们的效果。

source: Now tell the engines to apply full power one long and two short signals. You can use both horns and the whistle. Do not apply any power yourself yet, so you can see their effect.
target: 现在发出一长两短的信号告知其他机车施加全功率。你可以使用汽笛或风笛。你自己先不要施加任何牵引力，以便观察它们的效果。

source: Now that we have started the engine let's power up the radio and safety system. Turn on both J15 and RDST breakers. Also apply the direct brake to the maximum level. You can start the safety system when you have more than 2 bars of pressure in the brake cylinders.
target: 既然我们已经启动了发动机，现在来为电台和安全系统供电。开启 J15 和 RDST 断路器。同时将单阀施加至最大位。当制动缸压力超过 2 巴时，你就可以启动安全系统了。

source: Now that we have started the engine let's power up the radio and safety system. Turn on both J15 and RDST breakers. Also apply the direct brake to the maximum level. You can start the safety system when you have more than 2 bars of pressure in the brake cylinders.
target: 既然我们已经启动了发动机，现在来为电台和安全系统供电。开启 J15 和 RDST 断路器。同时将单阀施加至最大位。当制动缸压力超过 2 巴时，你就可以启动安全系统了。

source: Oh, well. This machine seems to feel more overheated than I do. It is better to reduce motoring to a necessary rate and let it glide downhill. The timetable is lazy enough. I hope it won't bring us much delay. On the other hand, every degree counts before the long and steep incline from Turnov to Rychnov.
target: 哎呀。这台机器似乎比我更感到过热。最好将牵引力降低到必要程度，让它滑行下坡。时刻表非常宽松。我希望这不会给我们带来太多延迟。另一方面，在从图尔诺夫到里赫诺夫漫长而陡峭的坡道之前，每一度温降都很重要。

source: Okay, call was being recorded. Your surname is Petřík, my surname is Zima and today is 18.8.2018.
target: 好的，通话正在录音。你姓彼得日克（Petřík），我姓齐马（Zima），今天是 2018 年 8 月 18 日。

source: Sit down in an available seat

So, the train has passed the brake test. But don't forget that the trainset stood here for few hours, and there may be a severe ice buildup on brake discs. After departure, apply brakes gently, use the OL2 on the engine to release its brake, and let the 843 and 043 deice brakes, so they are available for immediate action.
target: 好了，列车已通过制动试验。但别忘了列车在这里停放了几个小时，制动盘上可能有严重的结冰。发车后，请轻微施行制动，使用机车上的 OL2 来缓解机车制动，让 843 型和 043 型进行制动除冰，确保它们能随时发挥作用。

source: Sorry, I didn't realise I was over the line. I'll move out the way.

source: Switches here can switch between normal and backup type of regulation. You can also disable inputs into regulator, which could render the vehicle unusable for a while, but can be helpful with some problem solving. The little switch is particularly important, as it can turn on the maximum level of engine coolings.
target: 这里的开关可以在正常调节和备用调节之间切换。你也可以禁用牵引手柄输入，这虽然会导致车辆暂时无法使用，但有助于解决某些问题。那个小开关尤为重要，因为它可以开启发动机最大程度的冷却。

source: Take a brief ride along Liberec - Stará Paka route and learn what is available to be discovered.
target: 在利贝雷茨至斯塔拉帕卡的线路上简短游览一番，看看有哪些可供探索的内容。

source: Talking to the dispatcher and getting shunting clearance
target: 与调度员交谈并获得调车准许

source: Tell the engines to coast with one short signal.
target: 发出一次短声信号，示意机车滑行。

source: Tell the engines to coast with one short signal.
target: 发出一次短声信号，示意机车滑行。

source: That is all for today driver. Good luck on the rails!
target: 这就是今天的全部内容，司机。祝你在铁路上好运！

source: That is all for today driver. Good luck on the rails!
target: 这就是今天的全部内容，司机。祝你在铁路上好运！

source: That is correct, thank You for Your cooperation.
That was some crazy weather, great that You have made it!
target: 那天气真疯狂，很高兴你挺过来了！

source: That's it. You have completed the scenario.
target: 就是这样。你已经完成了场景。

source: That's it. You have retrieved the trainset back to the Liberec station.
target: 就是这样。你已经将列车组取回至利贝雷茨站。

source: The Engine Selection Switch decides which engine to start. The Class 843 has two diesel engines and this way you can start or shut them down. Positions in the left controls this vehicle and positions in the right control other vehicles in the train. Start by setting the switch to left position 1.
target: 发动机选择开关决定启动哪台发动机。Class 843 拥有两台柴油发动机，你可以通过这种方式启动或关闭它们。左侧的位置控制本车，右侧的位置控制列车中的其他车辆。首先将开关设置为左侧位置 1。

source: The Engine Selection Switch decides which engine to start. The Class 843 has two diesel engines and this way you can start or shut them down. Positions in the left controls this vehicle and positions in the right control other vehicles in the train. Start by setting the switch to left position 1.
target: 发动机选择开关决定启动哪台发动机。Class 843 拥有两台柴油发动机，你可以通过这种方式启动或关闭它们。左侧的位置控制本车，右侧的位置控制列车中的其他车辆。首先将开关设置为左侧位置 1。

source: The banking engines know about track speed restrictions, so in most cases you shouldn't have to worry about them pushing the train to greater speeds than allowed. However it is good practice to tell them to stop applying power before you start to brake. Don't worry if you get any of the signals wrong. You can just wait a few seconds and then try that signal again.
target: 补机司机了解线路速度限制，因此在大多数情况下，你无需担心他们将列车推至超过允许的速度。不过，在开始制动前告知他们停止施加动力是良好的做法。如果你发错信号也不要担心。只需等待几秒钟，然后再次尝试该信号即可。

source: The banking engines know about track speed restrictions, so in most cases you shouldn't have to worry about them pushing the train to greater speeds than allowed. However it is good practice to tell them to stop applying power before you start to brake. Don't worry if you get any of the signals wrong. You can just wait a few seconds and then try that signal again.
target: 补机司机了解线路速度限制，因此在大多数情况下，你无需担心他们将列车推至超过允许的速度。不过，在开始制动前告知他们停止施加动力是良好的做法。如果你发错信号也不要担心。只需等待几秒钟，然后再次尝试该信号即可。

source: The breakers can trip the power to some components on this locomotive. As we've discussed previously, the two most important ones are the J15 (VZ) and RDST breakers. The J15 powers the LVZ safety system and RDST powers the radio. If any of those breakers are tripped you need to close the yellow valve in the engine room.
target: 断路器可以切断该机车某些组件的电源。正如我们之前讨论过的，最重要的两个是 J15 (VZ) 和 RDST 断路器。J15 为 LVZ 安全系统供电，RDST 为无线电供电。如果其中任何一个断路器跳闸，你需要关闭机械室中的黄色阀门。

source: The breakers can trip the power to some components on this locomotive. As we've discussed previously, the two most important ones are the J15 (VZ) and RDST breakers. The J15 powers the LVZ safety system and RDST powers the radio. If any of those breakers are tripped you need to close the yellow valve in the engine room.
target: 断路器可以切断该机车某些组件的电源。正如我们之前讨论过的，最重要的两个是 J15 (VZ) 和 RDST 断路器。J15 为 LVZ 安全系统供电，RDST 为无线电供电。如果其中任何一个断路器跳闸，你需要关闭机械室中的黄色阀门。

source: The last important relay is the RP. This relay controls field diversion which happens at around 60 km/h, but it is decided by generator voltage and current, so it can also happen at higher speeds if you have lower notches selected.
target: 最后一个重要的继电器是 RP。该继电器控制磁场削弱，这通常发生在 60 km/h 左右，但它是由发电机电压和电流决定的，所以如果你选择了较低的档位，它也可能在更高的速度下发生。

source: The last important relay is the RP. This relay controls field diversion which happens at around 60 km/h, but it is decided by generator voltage and current, so it can also happen at higher speeds if you have lower notches selected.
target: 最后一个重要的继电器是 RP。该继电器控制磁场削弱，这通常发生在 60 km/h 左右，但它是由发电机电压和电流决定的，所以如果你选择了较低的档位，它也可能在更高的速度下发生。

source: The route was built between 1856 and 1859 and you will find many landmarks here, including Ještěd television tower, Hrubý Rohozec castle and Pantheon chapel near Malá Skála.
target: 这条线路建于 1856 年至 1859 年之间，你会在这里发现许多地标，包括耶什捷德电视塔、赫鲁比罗霍泽茨城堡和马拉斯卡拉附近的万神殿礼拜堂。

source: The route was built between 1856 and 1859 and you will find many landmarks here, including Ještěd television tower, Hrubý Rohozec castle and Pantheon chapel near Malá Skála.
target: 这条线路建于 1856 年至 1859 年之间，你会在这里发现许多地标，包括耶什捷德电视塔、赫鲁比罗霍泽茨城堡和马拉斯卡拉附近的万神殿礼拜堂。

source: The second set of relays are relays RS1, RS2 and RS3. Those are the wheelslip relays. Regulation checks the voltage difference between traction engines and if any of those are big enough it will trip said relay. The locomotive would then automatically lower power until the wheelslip stops.
target: 第二组继电器是继电器 RS1、RS2 和 RS3。这些是空转继电器。调节装置会检查牵引电机之间的电压差，如果其中任何一个电压差足够大，就会触发所述继电器。随后机车会自动降低功率，直到空转停止。

source: The second set of relays are relays RS1, RS2 and RS3. Those are the wheelslip relays. Regulation checks the voltage difference between traction engines and if any of those are big enough it will trip said relay. The locomotive would then automatically lower power until the wheelslip stops.
target: 第二组继电器是继电器 RS1、RS2 和 RS3。这些是空转继电器。调节装置会检查牵引电机之间的电压差，如果其中任何一个电压差足够大，就会触发所述继电器。随后机车会自动降低功率，直到空转停止。

source: The signaller gives you a clearance.

The storm has worsened and we have multiple level crossing failures reported. You have now been issued with Drive On Sight command to comply with operation in adverse weather conditions from station Železný Brod (here) to station Turnov. You will find locations of said level crossings in Your order.
target: 风暴已经恶化，我们收到了多处平交道口故障报告。你现在已收到目视行车命令，以遵守从热莱兹尼布罗德站（此处）到图尔诺夫站在恶劣天气条件下的运行要求。你可以在命令书中找到所述平交道口的位置。

source: The train is empty, you can begin shunting now. Thanks for the ride tonight.
target: 列车是空的，你现在可以开始调车了。感谢今晚的驾驶。

source: The yellow box with the valve is the safety system valve. If the safety system or radio aren't powered, air will leak through this valve. If you need to stop it and can't turn on any of those, then close the valve.
target: 带阀门的黄色盒子是安全系统阀。如果安全系统或无线电没有供电，空气将通过该阀门泄漏。如果你需要停止漏气且无法开启其中任何一个系统，请关闭该阀门。

source: The yellow box with the valve is the safety system valve. If the safety system or radio aren't powered, air will leak through this valve. If you need to stop it and can't turn on any of those, then close the valve.
target: 带阀门的黄色盒子是安全系统阀。如果安全系统或无线电没有供电，空气将通过该阀门泄漏。如果你需要停止漏气且无法开启其中任何一个系统，请关闭该阀门。

source: There are a few audible signals used for banking operations in Czechia. These can either be honks of the horn or blasts on the whistle. The most important is three short signals which tell the banking locomotives to stop applying any power.
target: 捷克有几种用于补机作业的音响信号。这些信号可以是鸣笛或鸣笛。最重要的是三个短信号，告知补机停止施加任何动力。

source: There are a few audible signals used for banking operations in Czechia. These can either be honks of the horn or blasts on the whistle. The most important is three short signals which tell the banking locomotives to stop applying any power.
target: 捷克有几种用于补机作业的音响信号。这些信号可以是鸣笛或鸣笛。最重要的是三个短信号，告知补机停止施加任何动力。

source: There are two ways how to tell the banking engines how to apply power. First one is one long and one short signals, which tells the engines to apply half power. Second is one long and two short signals, which tells the engines to apply maximum available power.
target: 有两种方法可以告知补机如何施加动力。第一种是一个长信号和一个短信号，告知补机施加一半动力。第二种是一个长信号和两个短信号，告知补机施加最大可用动力。

source: There are two ways how to tell the banking engines how to apply power. First one is one long and one short signals, which tells the engines to apply half power. Second is one long and two short signals, which tells the engines to apply maximum available power.
target: 有两种方法可以告知补机如何施加动力。第一种是一个长信号和一个短信号，告知补机施加一半动力。第二种是一个长信号和两个短信号，告知补机施加最大可用动力。

source: This is the safety system box. This locomotive is equipped with an LVZ safety system, which is responsible for checking driver's vigilance and also displays signal code, the latter applies only on routes that are equipped with said system.
target: 这是安全系统箱。该机车配备了 LVZ 安全系统，负责检查司机的警觉性，并显示信号码，后者仅适用于配备了该系统的线路。

source: This is the safety system box. This locomotive is equipped with an LVZ safety system, which is responsible for checking driver's vigilance and also displays signal code, the latter applies only on routes that are equipped with said system.
target: 这是安全系统箱。该机车配备了 LVZ 安全系统，负责检查司机的警觉性，并显示信号码，后者仅适用于配备了该系统的线路。

source: Those electro-pneumatic valves belong to the BPE - direct brake controller. Valves YV70 and YV71 are braking and releasing valves. Valves YV81 and YV83 control the parking brake, valves YV82 and YV84 then control the complementary brake, which applies in case the electrodynamic brake isn't strong enough.
target: 这些电磁气阀属于 BPE —— 直通制动控制器。阀门 YV70 和 YV71 是制动和缓解阀。阀门 YV81 和 YV83 控制停车制动，阀门 YV82 和 YV84 则控制补充制动，其在电阻制动强度不足的情况下施加。

source: Those electro-pneumatic valves belong to the BPE - direct brake controller. Valves YV70 and YV71 are braking and releasing valves. Valves YV81 and YV83 control the parking brake, valves YV82 and YV84 then control the complementary brake, which applies in case the electrodynamic brake isn't strong enough.
target: 这些电磁气阀属于 BPE —— 直通制动控制器。阀门 YV70 和 YV71 是制动和缓解阀。阀门 YV81 和 YV83 控制停车制动，阀门 YV82 和 YV84 则控制补充制动，其在电阻制动强度不足的情况下施加。

source: Those electro-pneumatic valves belong to the BSE - indirect brake controller. Valves YB and YR are braking valves where YR controls the emergency braking. Valve YO is for releasing, YZ controls brake cutout and YS is for the quick release.
target: 这些电磁气阀属于 BSE —— 间接制动控制器。阀门 YB 和 YR 是制动阀，其中 YR 控制紧急制动。阀门 YO 用于缓解，YZ 控制制动切断，YS 用于快速缓解。

source: Those electro-pneumatic valves belong to the BSE - indirect brake controller. Valves YB and YR are braking valves where YR controls the emergency braking. Valve YO is for releasing, YZ controls brake cutout and YS is for the quick release.
target: 这些电磁气阀属于 BSE —— 间接制动控制器。阀门 YB 和 YR 是制动阀，其中 YR 控制紧急制动。阀门 YO 用于缓解，YZ 控制制动切断，YS 用于快速缓解。

source: Those four switches toggle each traction engine. Be careful and don't operate those if the traction engines are under any power.
target: 这四个开关分别切换每台牵引电机。要小心，如果牵引电机正处于动力输出状态，请勿操作这些开关。
